text:
In reply to comment #33:

$ xdpyinfo:

    visual id:    0xd7
    class:    TrueColor
    depth:    24 planes
    available colormap entries:    256 per subfield
    red, green, blue masks:    0xff, 0xff00, 0xff0000
    significant bits in color specification:    8 bits
